role_delineation_check: The Social Worker manages the holiday staffing logistics and HHA referral status while the Patient Navigator verifies patient demographics in Atlantis, monitors the family's anxiety regarding the holiday care gap, and flags these sentiment scores to the SW for intervention.
narrative_summary: Margaret, a 77-year-old patient recovering from renal failure, faced a daunting transition home when her discharge was scheduled for the Friday afternoon preceding Labor Day weekend. Her daughter expressed significant anxiety about managing Margaret's complex medication regimen and dialysis schedule during a three-day period where the home health agency had no intake staff available. The Patient Navigator acted as a crucial liaison by documenting the family's rising panic in Atlantis and ensuring the Social Worker was alerted to the need for a confirmed Monday morning start-of-care to bridge the holiday gap.
demographic_audit_note: Audited Margaret's Atlantis profile against the facility face sheet; discovered the primary phone number listed was for a disconnected landline. Updated Atlantis with the daughter's mobile number and verified the home address was correct for HHA service area mapping.
v_card_flyer_status: Inserted the Healing Partners V-Card into the daughter's phone to ensure she would recognize the 'Healing Partners' caller ID during the holiday weekend and provided the program flyer to explain the Medical Assistant's role in the first home visit.
pre_dc_pulse_call: Conducted 24-hour pulse call; the daughter reached a sentiment score of 3/10, citing high anxiety over the lack of a weekend nurse. This sentiment was documented in Atlantis and flagged to the SW immediately.
atlantis_final_sync: Recorded the discharge date as Friday; synced the first Medical Assistant visit for Tuesday morning following the HHA's confirmed Monday afternoon admission.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Margaret is cleared for discharge on the Friday before Labor Day, but the HHA portal shows no assigned nurse for the weekend.
The daughter expresses fear that her mother will suffer a renal setback without professional monitoring over the long weekend.
The PN monitors the Atlantis portal and sees the HHA has finally accepted the referral but only for a Monday start-of-care.

format_2_triples.situation: Family is anxious about managing the renal diet and medications over the holiday weekend.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Educated the family on what to expect during the first 24 hours at home and how the MA visit would support them.

format_2_triples.situation: HHA intake status remains 'Pending' in the portal on Friday morning.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Verified HHA status via the Atlantis portal and flagged the lack of a confirmed SOC date to the Social Worker.

format_2_triples.situation: Daughter threatens to keep Margaret in the facility due to fear of the care gap.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Documented the sentiment score of 3 and requested the SW speak with the family to de-escalate the situation.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Wait for the holiday weekend to pass and check the Atlantis portal on Tuesday morning to see if the HHA nurse completed the admission.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This respects the SW's domain over holiday logistics but risks a transition breakdown if the family refuses discharge due to unaddressed anxiety.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Verify HHA acceptance via the portal, document the family's 'Caregiver Panic' in Atlantis, and ask the SW to clarify the Monday morning visit window for the family.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This uses liaison verbs to bridge the communication gap between the family and the SW without contacting the HHA vendor directly.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Call the HHA intake department directly to demand a Saturday nurse visit and offer to handle the clinical handoff documentation to speed up the process.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: This violates the Banned Actions rule by contacting the vendor and offering to handle clinical documentation, which is an automatic overstep of the PN role.
